program.name: ACCESS Model
program.fullName: Advancing Chronic Care with Effective, Scalable Solutions

phases.title: Readiness Assessment
phases.goal: Confirm eligibility, identify gaps, align leadership

tasks.title: Review ACCESS eligibility criteria and condition track requirements
Confirm Medicare FFS patient population and qualifying conditions
Assess existing technology infrastructure against ACCESS requirements
Identify care team roles and staffing gaps
Review outcome measurement framework and baseline performance
Conduct leadership alignment session
Submit or confirm participation application

phases.title: Operational Design
phases.goal: Design care workflows, assign team roles, select/confirm vendors

tasks.title: Map current care delivery workflows against ACCESS model requirements
Define care team roles (care coordinator, tech liaison, clinical lead)
Evaluate and select technology vendor(s) for condition track
Draft patient enrollment and alignment protocol
Develop staff training plan
Build internal communication plan for ACCESS launch
Establish data governance and patient consent processes

phases.title: Technology & Reporting Setup
phases.goal: Configure EHR, establish data feeds, stand up reporting infrastructure

tasks.title: Configure EHR to capture ACCESS-required outcome data fields
Establish data feed from technology vendor to reporting systems
Build outcome tracking dashboard (internal)
Test data completeness and accuracy against ACCESS measure definitions
Conduct end-to-end data flow validation
Document reporting workflow and assign ongoing ownership
Complete any CMS-required technical onboarding steps

phases.title: Enrollment & Launch
phases.goal: Align beneficiaries, train staff, go live

tasks.title: Begin beneficiary voluntary alignment (prospective)
Conduct staff training on ACCESS workflows and tools
Communicate launch timeline and expectations to clinical teams
Activate technology vendor solution for enrolled patients
Confirm CMS go-live requirements are met
Document baseline performance metrics for Year 1 comparison

phases.title: Monitoring & Optimization
phases.goal: Track performance, maintain compliance, improve outcomes

tasks.title: Review outcome metrics monthly against OAP targets
Monitor CMS ACCESS program updates and guidance changes
Conduct quarterly performance review with leadership
Identify and address care gaps for aligned beneficiaries
Update workflows and tools based on performance data
Track regulatory checkpoints and submission deadlines
Prepare Year 1 performance summary

checkpoints.title: Eligibility Confirmation
checkpoints.description: Confirm organization and patient population meets ACCESS criteria

checkpoints.title: Vendor Attestation
checkpoints.description: Confirm technology vendor meets ACCESS requirements

checkpoints.title: Data Governance Setup
checkpoints.description: Patient consent and data sharing protocols documented

checkpoints.title: EHR Configuration Validation
checkpoints.description: CMS-required data fields active and tested

checkpoints.title: CMS Technical Onboarding
checkpoints.description: Complete any required CMS system setup steps

checkpoints.title: Beneficiary Alignment Start
checkpoints.description: Confirm prospective alignment process is live

risks.title: Eligibility Misread
risks.mitigation: Review CMS FAQ and eligibility criteria with legal/compliance before applying

risks.title: Vendor Selection Delay
risks.mitigation: Begin vendor evaluation in Phase 1 in parallel with readiness assessment

risks.title: EHR Configuration Lag
risks.mitigation: Assign dedicated IT lead; build 30-day buffer into Phase 3 timeline

risks.title: Low Beneficiary Alignment
risks.mitigation: Develop patient outreach strategy and staff scripts in Phase 2

risks.title: Staff Resistance to Workflow Change
risks.mitigation: Early clinical champion identification; include frontline staff in design

risks.title: CMS Guidance Change Mid-Rollout
risks.mitigation: Monitor CMS ACCESS page and Federal Register weekly; maintain flexible workplan

risks.title: Reporting Data Quality Failure
risks.mitigation: Test data completeness in Phase 3 before go-live

risks.title: Leadership Misalignment
risks.mitigation: Executive sponsor kickoff session in Phase 1

risks.title: Outcome Performance Below OAP Threshold
risks.mitigation: Establish baseline metrics at launch; review monthly with clinical leads

risks.title: Staff Turnover Affecting Program Continuity
risks.mitigation: Document all workflows; cross-train at least two staff per key role

risks.title: Missing CMS Reporting Deadlines
risks.mitigation: Assign compliance owner to calendar all deadlines; build 2-week lead time into each

risks.title: Underestimation of Reporting Infrastructure Lead Time
risks.mitigation: Begin IT scoping in Phase 1; treat reporting setup as a parallel workstream

risks.title: Unclear Patient Consent and Data Sharing Protocols
risks.mitigation: Engage legal/compliance in Phase 2 data governance design; document before enrollment begins

risks.title: Technology Activation Delay at Launch
risks.mitigation: Complete vendor testing in Phase 3; confirm activation readiness 2 weeks before go-live

risks.title: Staff Readiness Gaps at Go-Live
risks.mitigation: Complete all training at least 2 weeks before go-live; conduct dry run with care team

risks.title: CMS Reporting Format Mismatch
risks.mitigation: Validate output format against CMS technical specs before finalizing EHR configuration
